renderDetails.messageTitle: ComfyUI fresh install: Command may require input

content:
The command output has stabilized for 5s. The output delta since last check is:
warn: The recent workspace C:\Users\joel0\Documents\comfy\ComfyUI is not a 
valid ComfyUI path.
+----------------------------  Update Available! -----------------------------+
|  Newer version of comfy-cli is available: 1.10.4.                           |
| Current version: 1.4.0                                                      |
| Update by running: 'pip install --upgrade comfy-cli'                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
warn: The recent workspace C:\Users\joel0\Documents\comfy\ComfyUI is not a 
valid ComfyUI path.
Install from https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI to C:\Users\joel0\Documents\comfy\ComfyUI? [y/N]: 

The command appears to be waiting for input: The command is asking whether to proceed with installing ComfyUI from a specific URL.
